keywords.job: Job? I have no job. I just live for the gods of Tibia.
keywords.name: My name is Quentin.
keywords.tibia: That is where we are. The world of Tibia. Admire it's beauty.
keywords.god: They created Tibia and all life on it.
keywords.life: On Tibia there are many forms of life. There are plants and people and monsters.
keywords.plant: Just walk around, you will see grass, trees, and bushes.
keywords.people: I am a simple monk. I just know Sam, Frodo, and Gorn. They all live in the main street to the north.
keywords.sam: He is our blacksmith. He sells weapons and armour.
keywords.frodo: He is the owner of Frodo's Hut, the tavern north of this temple.
keywords.gorn: He is selling equipment. If you still have no backpack you should go and ask him for one.
keywords.elane: She is the leader of the local Paladins' guild.
keywords.muriel: Muriel is a famous sorcerer. She is the keeper of arcane secrets that are known only to few mortals.
keywords.gregor: The leader of the Knights' guild is a man of few words.
keywords.marvik: I admire the healing skills of Marvik.
keywords.king: Our king resides in the castle to the west.
keywords.tibianus: Our king resides in the castle to the west.
keywords.lynda: She is a highly competent priest.
keywords.harkath: A hard man but his heart is in the right right place.
keywords.army: I don't know much about the Tibian army. Ask general Harkath Bloodblade about that.
keywords.ferumbras: Hush! Do not mention the Evil One in these walls.
keywords.bozo: He is the king's jester, but he believes himself to be the king of fools.
keywords.baxter: He is the guard of the royal castle.
keywords.oswald: This man is spreading horrible rumours all the time.
keywords.sherry: The McRonalds run the local farm.
keywords.mcronald: The McRonalds run the local farm.
keywords.donald: The McRonalds run the local farm.
keywords.lugri: Please do not mention the fallen one.
keywords.excalibug: Legends tell us that that Excalibug is a gift of the gods. Banor used in his battles.  They say it was passed on to one of his followers.
keywords.news: Sorry, I know nothing new. Please ask Frodo about that topic.
keywords.monster: There are really too many of them in Tibia. But who am I to challenge the wisdom of the gods?
keywords.help: First you should try to get some gold to buy better equipment.
keywords.quest: First you should try to get some gold to buy better equipment.
keywords.task: First you should try to get some gold to buy better equipment.
keywords.what: First you should try to get some gold to buy better equipment.
keywords.do: First you should try to get some gold to buy better equipment.
keywords.gold: If you need money you should slay monsters and take their gold. Look for spiders and rats.
keywords.money: If you need money you should slay monsters and take their gold. Look for spiders and rats.
keywords.spider: There are spiders' nests beyond our city near Gorn's shop and at the McRonalds' farm in the east.
keywords.rat: There are sewers underneath the city. They say these sewers are brimming with rats.
keywords.sewer: You can enter the sewers thorugh a sewer grate. But watch out. There are many rats. And don't forget to bring a torch.
keywords.equipment: First you should buy a bag or backpack. That way your hands will be free to hold a weapon and a shield.
keywords.fight: Take a weapon into your hand and select a target. If you are wounded you should eat some food to heal your wounds.
keywords.slay: Take a weapon into your hand and select a target. If you are wounded you should eat some food to heal your wounds.
keywords.eat: If you would like to heal your wounds you should eat some food. Frodo sells excellent meals. But if you are very weak you can also come to me. I will heal you.
keywords.food: If you would like to heal your wounds you should eat some food. Frodo sells excellent meals. But if you are very weak you can also come to me. I will heal you.
keywords.heal$: You aren't looking that bad. Sorry, I can't help you. But if you are looking for additional protection you should go on the pilgrimage of ashes.
keywords.blessing: There are five different blessings available in five sacred places. These blessings are: the spiritual shielding, the spark of the phoenix, the embrace of tibia, the fire of the suns and the wisdom of solitude.
keywords.pilgrimage: Whenever you receive a lethal wound your lifeforce is damaged. With every single of the five blessings you have this damage will be reduced.
keywords.ashes: Whenever you receive a lethal wound your lifeforce is damaged. With every single of the five blessings you have this damage will be reduced.
keywords.spiritual: You can receive the spiritual shielding in the whiteflower temple south of Thais.
keywords.shielding: You can receive the spiritual shielding in the whiteflower temple south of Thais.
keywords.sacred: Just ask in which of the five blessings you are interested in.
keywords.places: Just ask in which of the five blessings you are interested in.
keywords.spark: The spark of the phoenix is given by the dwarven priests of earth and fire in Kazordoon.
keywords.phoenix: The spark of the phoenix is given by the dwarven priests of earth and fire in Kazordoon.
keywords.embrace: The druids north of Carlin can provide you with the embrace of tibia.
keywords.fire: Ask for the blessing of the two suns in the suntower near Ab'Dendriel .
keywords.suns: Ask for the blessing of the two suns in the suntower near Ab'Dendriel .
keywords.wisdom: Talk to the hermit Eremo on the isle of Cormaya about this blessing.
keywords.solitude: Talk to the hermit Eremo on the isle of Cormaya about this blessing.
keywords.time: Now, it is . Ask Gorn for a watch, if you need one.

texts: Welcome, adventurer ! If you are new in Tibia, ask me for help.
Job? I have no job. I just live for the gods of Tibia.

greetingPatterns.response: Welcome, adventurer %N! If you are new in Tibia, ask me for help.
